evals.expected_output: Skill proceeds through all checks cleanly, reaches finalise path, appends to merge-log, emits graphify-skipped banner since graphify_cmd is empty.
expectations: Skill reaches the finalise path (step 8a), not the revert path
Skill notes that graphify_cmd is not configured and skips the graph-coupling check with an explicit banner
Skill identifies no bypass — leaf-01 and leaf-02 are both in merge-log
Skill appends a new row to merge-log.md for leaf-03

evals.expected_output: Skill detects that leaf-02 has a brief in briefs_dir but no entry in merge-log, emits BYPASS DETECTED warning, and does not proceed without confirmation.
expectations: Skill emits a BYPASS DETECTED warning identifying leaf-02
Skill blocks further progress until the user confirms whether to audit the bypass or accept the risk
Skill does not copy any staged files to destinations during this run

evals.expected_output: Skill detects that test_cache_hit regressed (was passing pre-merge, fails post-merge). Despite net count going from 3 to 5 (net +2), skill triggers the revert path and reports the regression by test name.
expectations: Skill identifies test_cache_hit as having regressed (was PASSED, is now FAILED)
Skill triggers the revert path, not the finalise path
Skill explicitly states that net delta is irrelevant because a prior test regressed
Skill does NOT merge the staged files despite net assertion count increasing

evals.expected_output: Staging directory contains tests/umbrella_extended.py which matches parent_owned glob tests/umbrella*.py. Skill rejects at step 2 G1 check, names the offending file and the glob it matched.
expectations: Skill rejects the staged files at the parent-owned check (step 2 G1)
Skill identifies tests/umbrella_extended.py as the offending file
Skill cites the parent_owned glob pattern it matched (tests/umbrella*.py)
Skill does not proceed to copy any files or run the umbrella

evals.expected_output: Skill reads leaf-03.ASSUMPTIONS.md and leaf-02.ASSUMPTIONS.md, detects that leaf-02 assumes cache miss returns {} while leaf-03 assumes it returns None, blocks the merge and lists the contradiction explicitly.
expectations: Skill reads both leaf-03.ASSUMPTIONS.md and leaf-02.ASSUMPTIONS.md
Skill detects the contradiction on cache_miss_return value (None vs {})
Skill blocks the merge at step 6.5 and lists the conflict explicitly
Skill does not proceed to finalise despite umbrella passing

evals.expected_output: Skill parses the ## Acceptance block from leaf-03.md, runs pytest tests/test_cache_ttl.py -v as a second gate, reports it passed, and proceeds to finalise.
expectations: Skill parses the ## Acceptance block from the brief and identifies the test command
Skill runs the brief acceptance command as a second independent gate
Skill reports the acceptance gate passed
Skill proceeds to finalise after both umbrella and acceptance gate pass
